text.title: AIO Risk Scoring Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the per-query decision-row shape, action-mapping rule, and re-score cadence.

section.title: Required decision-row fields

list.item: query (string)
scored_at_utc (ISO timestamp)
scored_by (named human OR named agent identity with human approver)
axes (object with six keys, each integer 0-4)
risk_index (integer 0-24 with default weights)
action (enum: skip, target, hedge)
rationale (string >= 60 chars)
next_review_utc (ISO date; <= 90 days from scored_at_utc)
tracker_snapshot_ref (reference to the AIO presence snapshot used)

section.reference: Authoritative JSON Schema for the decision row.

list.item: skip: risk_index >= 16 OR monetisation_potential == 0.
target: 10 <= risk_index < 16 AND our_citation_eligibility >= 2.
hedge: otherwise — write, with middle-funnel CTA emphasis.
Quarterly batch re-score for all decision rows.
Threshold-triggered re-score when the sibling tracker reports a > 25 point presence shift on the query.
Decisions older than next_review_utc are flagged `expired` and excluded from the topic-cluster plan until re-scored.

antipattern.reason: r4 violation. Zero-monetisation queries default to skip; exceptions require explicit override in rationale.

antipattern.description: axes object missing any of the six keys.
antipattern.reason: r1 violation. Six-axis scoring is non-negotiable.

antipattern.description: rationale text < 60 chars or contains only "gut feel" / "feels right".
action mapping defies the rule table (e.g. risk_index=20 with action=hedge).
antipattern.reason: r2 violation. Mapping must follow the rubric.

list.item: Every axis score is 0-4 integer.
risk_index = computed weighted sum, not hand-edited.
tracker_snapshot_ref points to a real snapshot within last 30 days.
next_review_utc set within 90 days.
Action consistent with the rule table.
